# API Reference (Auto-Generated)

The full API reference is generated automatically from the actual Dart source in `packages/flutterxel`.

## Open Generated Reference

[Open flutterxel API docs](../api/flutterxel/index.html)

## Generation Command

```bash
bash docs/scripts/generate_api_docs.sh
```

This runs `dart doc` in `packages/flutterxel` and outputs files to:

- `docs/site/api/flutterxel/`

## Why This Page Exists

This project intentionally avoids hand-maintained API signature pages.
Generated API docs are the source of truth for members, signatures, and class-level details.
